title: Scientific/Expert Advisory Committees - Canada.ca
content:
## Scientific/Expert Advisory Committees
Scientific/Expert Advisory Committees are standing committees that provide on-going medical/technical/scientific advice and recommendations on regulatory issues for drugs and medical devices in specific therapeutic areas or classes. Committee members are chosen through a formal nomination process involving a wide range of stakeholders.
If you are interested in being considered as a committee member please visit the Enhanced Review Capacity Initiative section of our web site for information on how to become part of the Therapeutic Products Directorate's (TPD's) Scientific Experts Inventory and Database.
Only our current active committees are included on this site. For materials from past meetings of active committees and committees that are dormant, or whose mandate is completed, please refer to the list below. Please contact Policy Bureau Enquires for additional information.

## Current Scientific Advisory Bodies
- Health Products for Women
- Medical Devices Used in the Cardiovascular System
- Digital Health Technologies (SAC-DHT)

## Completed or Active - Scientific Advisory Bodies
For materials from past meetings of active committees and for committees that are dormant, or whose mandate is completed, please contact Policy Bureau Enquires for additional information.
Scientific / Expert Advisory Committee
Medical Devices Used in the Cardiovascular System (SAC-MDUCS - previous meetings)
